fixtures._comment: interrupt-headless — 'Book an intro call' content fallback for the no-tools turn. The toolName:schedule_meeting fixtures above only match when schedule_meeting is in the tool list; the headless flow also issues a turn with tools:[], so the model cannot emit a tool call and those fixtures are skipped → strict 503. This ungated content-only fallback covers that turn and is loop-safe (no toolCalls).

match.userMessage: Book an intro call with the sales team to discuss pricing

response.content: I've started booking an intro call with the sales team to discuss pricing — pick one of the proposed times to confirm.
